subcodes.first_line: O My servant, O Steadfast One! There hath been sent down for thee in the Book of them that love Me mention after mention, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord, the Manifest One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدی یا ثابت قد نزل لک فی کتاب من احبنی ذکرناک مره بعد مره لتشکر ربک مظهر
